name: Fruit Soup
recipeInstructions:
(melons, oranges, nectarines,
peaches and bananas are good choices, but use
whatever is in season)
1. Combine the tapioca with 1 cup of water. Bring to a boil.
2. Simmer for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Add orange juice and mix until well blended.
4. Add the remaining water. Stir.
5. Cover and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
6. Cut fruit into bite-size pieces and add to the chilled soup.
7. Serve in well-chilled mugs.
8. Garnish with fresh mint if available.
Makes 6 servings.
